_: Axocoatl identity palette — starting hex values translated from the CMYK numbers on the identity card. Tweak these once we see them in the dashboard. Each entry has a CSS variable name for use in the app and the marketing site.

jade_green.role: Primary. The serpent body. App primary action color (could replace --accent over time).

bronze_gold.role: Secondary. Metalwork, Greek-key borders, accents. Warm contrast to the jade.

circuit_blue.role: Accent. Eye glow, circuit traces, 'tech inside myth' moments. Sparingly.
